title: Mace PvP
description: A simple plug and play mace pvp modpack with good performance.
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dacff15594f5832eb8801ffa50d806a8131fe61.png)

# The modpack
This is my personal mace pvp modpack.   
It has:
- performance mods
- nice resource packs
- pre-added servers to practice

# The purpose

This modpack was an idea of mine for new mace players to not feel overwhelmed when they want to start, but don't know what they want or need. This modpack includes basic mods and lots of performance mods so they can start immediately.

---

That is it for now, I will make sure to add new stuff when something new gets released.   
Have fun playing it!
